# crowci_organization_registries (Data Source)

Fetches all container registry credentials for a specific organization on the Crow CI server.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "crowci_organization_registries" "example" {
  org_id = 1
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `org_id` (Number) ID of the organization to list registries for.

### Read-Only

- `registries` (Attributes List) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--registries))

<a id="nestedatt--registries"></a>
### Nested Schema for `registries`

Read-Only:

- `address` (String) Registry address.
- `created_at` (Number) Creation time as a Unix timestamp.
- `id` (Number) Registry ID.
- `readonly` (Boolean) Whether the registry is read-only.
- `repo_id` (Number) Repo scope of the registry.
- `updated_at` (Number) Last update time as a Unix timestamp.
- `username` (String) Registry username.
